headline: 13 source files (100%) have low structural coverage

findings.title: 13 source files (100%) have low structural coverage
findings.description: Files with no test coverage are blind spots for change-scoped test selection. They will not be protected by `terrain impact`.

findings.title: 3 skipped tests consuming CI resources
findings.description: Skipped tests still occupy CI queue slots and mask coverage gaps. Review whether each skip is still justified or should be removed.

findings.title: 5 high-fanout nodes exceed threshold of 10
findings.description: Highest: src/utils with 19 transitive dependents. Changes to high-fanout nodes trigger disproportionate test impact.

recommendations.action: Add tests for 13 uncovered source files
recommendations.rationale: Coverage gaps mean changes in these files cannot trigger targeted test selection.
Skipped tests still occupy CI queue slots and mask coverage gaps. Review whether each skip is still justified or should be removed.

limitations: No coverage data; coverage confidence is structural (import-based) only.
No policy file found; governance checks skipped.
No runtime data; static skip detection is available, but flaky/slow/dead/unstable signals still require runtime artifacts.
